caption: The video features Jeff Kelly, a Senior Analyst at Wikibon, speaking at the Big Data SV 2015 event. He is dressed in a formal gray suit with a white shirt and a patterned tie, and he has a microphone attached to his ear, indicating that he is addressing an audience or participating in a panel discussion. In the first image, Jeff is gesturing with his hands, emphasizing a point as he speaks. In the second image, he appears to be listening attentively, possibly to another speaker or a question from the audience. The background prominently displays the event's branding, reinforcing the professional and tech-focused nature of the gathering. The overall setting suggests a structured and informative session on big data topics.
